abilities.description: Conjure a duplicate of another target creature card in your graveyard onto the top of your library. The duplicate perpetually gets +1/+1 and gains deathtouch. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Conjure a duplicate of another target creature card in your graveyard onto the top of your library. The duplicate perpetually gets +1/+1 and gains deathtouch. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: MakeCard

abilities.target_prompt: Select another target creature card in your graveyard
